module.name: freebox
module.description: Free-floating box you can move, resize and rotate directly on the preview (Edit layout mode).

snippet.label: Free box
snippet.description: A box that flows normally until you move/resize/rotate it on the preview.

snippet.label: Free box (placed)
snippet.text: <!-- @freebox x: 50, y: 40, w: 40, h: 20, halign: center, valign: middle --> Positioned box <!-- @end -->
snippet.description: A free box pre-placed at the centre. halign: left|center|right, valign: top|middle|bottom.
